# pocoo — Loop Engineering Experiment Logs

> Chronological registry of experiments in learned context-pruning,
> loop engineering, and the kompress-v8 production model. 24 posts
> from June 11-25, 2026.

## About

pocoo.vaked.dev is the public experiment log for the kompress research
program. Each post documents a specific finding, technique, or
milestone in the development of kompress-v8 — a 149M-parameter
dual-head ModernBERT for learned context pruning.

The research produced the ICLR 2027 manuscript "Asymmetric Loss
Modulation Resolves the Voting Ensemble Paradox in Learned
Context-Pruning Ensembles."

## Posts (newest first)

### 2026-06-25

- **Fine-tuning Kompress: the Sapir-Whorf case**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-fine-tuning-kompress-sapir-whorf.html
  3.0x penalty on critical-syntactic tokens (signal names, file paths,
  exit codes) during fine-tuning. The Sapir-Whorf hypothesis applied
  to token-level compression.

- **Iterative self-labeling**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-iterative-self-labeling.html
  v3→v4 self-labeling loop: use A+B mechanisms as oracle to relabel
  training data, then retrain. Each iteration improves label quality.

- **Heretic adversarial eval**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-kompress-heretic-eval.html
  Override lift 0.942→0.969. The heretic set is 8 prompts designed
  to test must-keep token preservation under adversarial conditions.

- **Closing the Training-Production Gap (v6 agent distribution)**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-kompress-v6-agent-distribution.html
  Agent-distribution training: expose the model to diverse compression
  scenarios during training to close the gap between train and deploy.

- **Loop engineering applied**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-loop-engineering-applied.html
  Mapping Osmani + Anthropic patterns to the kompress development loop.
  Four-tier loop structure: outer (API), inner (GPU), local (MCP), meta (CI).

- **LoopKit starter kit**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-loopkit.html
  Open-source release of the four-phase autonomous state machine
  implementing Loop Engineering for compression model training.

- **The loop shipped**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-the-loop-shipped.html
  17 models trained, 8 teachers, 4 architectures, $38.95 total compute.
  The entire research program cost less than a conference registration.

- **The silver label problem**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-the-silver-label-problem.html
  28% noise floor diagnostic. Average mk_in_ref across 9 domains: 0.43.
  Label quality is the bottleneck, not model capacity.

- **We ran the loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-25-we-ran-the-loop.html
  14-step roadmap post-mortem. What worked, what didn't, what we'd
  do differently.

### 2026-06-24

- **Compressing the loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-compressing-the-loop.html
  Headroom + Honey benchmarks. Comparing compression approaches.

- **Form the tool to ourselves (freedom of tools)**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-freedom-of-tools.html
  Philosophical reflection on tool use and agency in AI development.

- **The genesis contract, formally**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-genesis-contract-formally.html
  Formal specification of the genesis contract — the initial state
  commitment that binds the research program.

- **Loop Radio**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-loop-radio.html
  Music and audio experiments related to loop engineering patterns.

- **Local M3/M1 dogfeed loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-m3-dogfeed-headroom.html
  Running the compression pipeline on local Apple Silicon. Dogfooding
  the tools on consumer hardware.

- **Reduce till it's a loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-reduce-till-its-a-loop.html
  The core insight: keep reducing until the process becomes a loop.
  When you can't reduce further, you've found the invariant.

- **Slop is data**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-slop-is-data.html
  AI-generated content ("slop") is training data for the next iteration.
  The loop consumes its own output.

- **The correctable loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-the-correctable-loop.html
  The loop must be correctable: if the eval metric doesn't improve
  in 3 iterations, stop. This is the invariant.

- **The loop is already here**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-the-loop-is-already-here.html
  You're already in a loop. The question is whether it's correctable.

- **Your first free infinite loop**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-24-your-first-free-infinite-loop.html
  Getting started with Loop Engineering. The basics of the four-tier
  loop structure.

### 2026-06-23

- **Maxwell's Demon and honest work**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-23-maxwell-demon-honest-work.html
  Thermodynamic analogy for information compression. Maxwell's demon
  as a metaphor for the compression agent.

- **MLIR agent topology**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-23-mlir-agent-topology.html
  Using MLIR (Multi-Level Intermediate Representation) concepts to
  model agent communication topology.

- **Stigmergy: routing without asking**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-23-stigmergy-routing-without-asking.html
  Stigmergic coordination: agents communicate through the environment
  rather than directly. Applied to compression routing.

- **Vaked language above Nix**
  https://pocoo.vaked.dev/posts/2026-06-23-vaked-language-above-nix.html
  The vaked programming language as a higher-level abstraction over
  Nix for reproducible research environments.

## Ecosystem

- Interactive paper: https://kompress.vaked.dev/notebook/
- Paper PDF: https://kompress.vaked.dev/paper/main.pdf
- GitHub: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/longrun-eval-kompress
- Model: https://huggingface.co/PeetPedro/kompress-v8
- Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/PeetPedro/ultrawhale-dogfood
- Training engine: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/loopkit
- Outer loop: https://github.com/peterlodri-sec/ultrawhale
- Chat: https://chat.vaked.dev
- Protocol: https://protocol.vaked.dev
